title: VendorCapabilityMapping
description: L2 — A first-class, evidenced assertion that a vendor capability maps onto an L1 domain concept or business capability, with an explicit coverage level and named gaps. The unit the Coverage Map and Gap Analysis views read.

vendorCapability.description: The vendor-side capability name being mapped.

mappedConcept.description: Typed reference to the L1 element this vendor capability claims to cover.

coverage.description: Coverage level — maps 1:1 onto the Coverage Map cell status covered|partial|uncovered.

coveragePercentage.description: Optional numeric coverage estimate (0–100), where stated by the source.

gaps.description: Named shortfalls — what the vendor capability does NOT cover for this concept.
